{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"call_9efa76dfefe2462b9c3cdc6b","type":"tool_result","content":"1\t/**\n2\t * Spaxel Dashboard - Renderer Backward-Compatibility Tests\n3\t *\n4\t * RUNTIME (jsdom) proof for parent bf-2gmx (\"Verify backward compatibility for\n5\t * blob identity fields\"): the dashboard renderer must render blobs that LACK\n6\t * the identity fields (personName / assignedColor / identityResolved and their\n7\t * snake_case aliases person_name / assigned_color / person_label / person_color)\n8\t * WITHOUT throwing or emitting undefined/NaN, while identity-resolved blobs\n9\t * still render WITH their identity (label + per-person color).\n10\t *\n11\t * Why the ambient Canvas 2D renderer (and not the 3D viz3d renderer):\n12\t * The 3D renderer viz3d.js evaluates `new THREE.Raycaster()` and\n13\t * `new THREE.Vector2()` at module top level and depends on Three.js (WebGL),\n14\t * which is unavailable under jsdom — so it cannot be loaded here. That is\n15\t * exactly why every existing dashboard test suite SKIPS the renderer. The\n16\t * ambient renderer (ambient_renderer.js) is the renderer path that DOES load\n17\t * under jsdom: it is a self-contained IIFE backed by the Canvas 2D context\n18\t * mock in ambient.test.setup.js. Its drawPeople() is the one code path that\n19\t * reads a blob's identity fields (person_label || person) directly during blob\n20\t * rendering and funnels them through the hardened getPersonColor() helper\n21\t * (bf-gcotl added the `if (!personName) return '#6b7280'` guard). Loading it\n22\t * for real and driving a render frame is therefore a genuine runtime proof of\n23\t * the backward-compat contract, not just a type check.\n24\t *\n25\t * Bead: bf-20cl7. Parent: bf-2gmx. Static audit: bf-gcotl.\n26\t */\n27\t\n28\tdescribe('Renderer backward-compat with identity-less blobs', function () {\n29\t\n30\t    let canvas;\n31\t    let renderer;\n32\t    let ctx;\n33\t\n34\t    // Identity fields are all OPTIONAL on the wire. A pre-identity (identity-less)\n35\t    // blob — e.g. one emitted by the local sim WITHOUT --ble — carries NONE of:\n36\t    //   personName / person_name / personLabel / person_label / person\n37\t    //   assignedColor / assigned_color / personColor / person_color\n38\t    //   identityResolved\n39\t    function makeIdentityLessBlob(overrides) {\n40\t        return Object.assign({\n41\t            id: 1,\n42\t            x: 2.5,\n43\t            y: 2.5,\n44\t            z: 1.0,\n45\t            vx: 0,\n46\t            vy: 0,\n47\t            vz: 0,\n48\t            confidence: 0.8\n49\t            // NOTE: no identity fields at all\n50\t        }, overrides || {});\n51\t    }\n52\t\n53\t    function makeIdentityResolvedBlob(overrides) {\n54\t        // Identity-resolved blob carries the full identity field set, including\n55\t        // both the camelCase (viz3d / ble-panel) and snake_case (ambient renderer)\n56\t        // aliases. The renderer must pick up the identity and render with it.\n57\t        return Object.assign(makeIdentityLessBlob({\n58\t            id: 1,\n59\t            person_label: 'Alice',\n60\t            person_name: 'Alice',\n61\t            personName: 'Alice',\n62\t            assignedColor: '#3b82f6',\n63\t            assigned_color: '#3b82f6',\n64\t            personColor: '#3b82f6',\n65\t            person_color: '#3b82f6',\n66\t            identityResolved: true\n67\t        }), overrides || {});\n68\t    }\n69\t\n70\t    // Load the renderer into jsdom (runs the IIFE → window.SpaxelAmbientRenderer).\n71\t    function ensureRendererLoaded() {\n72\t        if (typeof window.SpaxelAmbientRenderer === 'undefined') {\n73\t            require('./ambient_renderer.js');\n74\t        }\n75\t        return window.SpaxelAmbientRenderer;\n76\t    }\n77\t\n78\t    function setupRenderer() {\n79\t        renderer = ensureRendererLoaded();\n80\t\n81\t        canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n82\t        canvas.width = 800;\n83\t        canvas.height = 600;\n84\t        canvas.style.width = '800px';\n85\t        canvas.style.height = '600px';\n86\t        document.body.appendChild(canvas);\n87\t\n88\t        renderer.init(canvas, { scale: 50, margin: 40 });\n89\t        // Determinism: stop the background RAF loop and drive frames manually.\n90\t        renderer.stopRenderLoop();\n91\t\n92\t        ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n93\t\n94\t        // Capture fillStyle at the moment a filled arc is drawn so we can assert\n95\t        // the color used for each blob (the renderer overwrites fillStyle later\n96\t        // for the status dot / time text, so reading it post-frame is unreliable).\n97\t        arcFillStyles = [];\n98\t        const origArc = ctx.arc;\n99\t        ctx.arc = function (x, y, radius, startAngle, endAngle) {\n100\t            arcFillStyles.push(ctx.fillStyle);\n101\t            return origArc.apply(this, arguments);\n102\t        };\n103\t    }\n104\t\n105\t    let arcFillStyles;\n106\t\n107\t    function renderBlobs(blobs) {\n108\t        renderer.updateState({ blobs: blobs });\n109\t        renderer.render();\n110\t    }\n111\t\n112\t    // The label strings passed to ctx.fillText() across the rendered frame.\n113\t    function fillTextArgs() {\n114\t        const calls = (ctx.fillText && ctx.fillText.mock && ctx.fillText.mock.calls) || [];\n115\t        return calls.map(function (c) { return c[0]; });\n116\t    }\n117\t\n118\t    beforeEach(function () {\n119\t        setupRenderer();\n120\t    });\n121\t\n122\t    afterEach(function () {\n123\t        // Flush module singleton state so tests don't leak blob ids into each other.\n124\t        try {\n125\t            if (renderer) {\n126\t                renderer.updateState({ blobs: [], zones: [], portals: [], nodes: [], alerts: [] });\n127\t                renderer.destroy();\n128\t            }\n129\t        } catch (e) { /* swallow teardown errors */ }\n130\t        if (canvas && canvas.parentNode) {\n131\t            canvas.parentNode.removeChild(canvas);\n132\t        }\n133\t        renderer = null;\n134\t        canvas = null;\n135\t        ctx = null;\n136\t        arcFillStyles = [];\n137\t    });\n138\t\n139\t    // ── module loads under jsdom ───────────────────────────────────────────────\n140\t\n141\t    describe('renderer loads into jsdom', function () {\n142\t        it('attaches window.SpaxelAmbientRenderer when the module is required', function () {\n143\t            // beforeEach → ensureRendererLoaded() → require('./ambient_renderer.js').\n144\t            // The assertion passes iff that require ran the module's IIFE and\n145\t            // attached the renderer to window WITHOUT throwing — i.e. the renderer\n146\t            // is genuinely loadable under jsdom (the thing viz3d cannot do).\n147\t            expect(window.SpaxelAmbientRenderer).toBeDefined();\n148\t            expect(typeof window.SpaxelAmbientRenderer).toBe('object');\n149\t            expect(typeof window.SpaxelAmbientRenderer.init).toBe('function');\n150\t            expect(typeof window.SpaxelAmbientRenderer.render).toBe('function');\n151\t            expect(typeof window.SpaxelAmbientRenderer.updateState).toBe('function');\n152\t        });\n153\t    });\n154\t\n155\t    // ── identity-LESS blobs (the backward-compat core) ─────────────────────────\n156\t\n157\t    describe('blob with NO identity fields', function () {\n158\t        it('renders a full frame without throwing', function () {\n159\t            expect(function () {\n160\t                renderBlobs([makeIdentityLessBlob()]);\n161\t            }).not.toThrow();\n162\t        });\n163\t\n164\t        it('applies a sane fallback label and never emits \"undefined\"/\"NaN\"', function () {\n165\t            renderBlobs([makeIdentityLessBlob()]);\n166\t\n167\t            const labels = fillTextArgs();\n168\t            expect(labels.length).toBeGreaterThan(0);\n169\t            labels.forEach(function (text) {\n170\t                const s = String(text);\n171\t                expect(s).not.toMatch(/undefined/i);\n172\t                expect(s).not.toMatch(/NaN/);\n173\t            });\n174\t            // Unknown blob falls back to the '?' label, not a name.\n175\t            expect(labels).toContain('?');\n176\t        });\n177\t\n178\t        it('colors the blob with the neutral fallback, not a per-person color', function () {\n179\t            renderBlobs([makeIdentityLessBlob()]);\n180\t            // getPersonColor(undefined) -> '#6b7280' (grey) is the fillStyle in\n181\t            // effect when the blob's arc is stroked. '#22c55e' is the green status\n182\t            // dot drawn afterwards — neither is an identity-derived color.\n183\t            expect(arcFillStyles).toContain('#6b7280');\n184\t            arcFillStyles.forEach(function (c) {\n185\t                // No identity color (hsl hash) should be produced for an identity-less blob.\n186\t                expect(String(c)).not.toMatch(/^hsl\\(/);\n187\t            });\n188\t        });\n189\t\n190\t        it('stays safe when every identity field is explicitly null', function () {\n191\t            expect(function () {\n192\t                renderBlobs([makeIdentityLessBlob({\n193\t                    personName: null,\n194\t                    person_name: null,\n195\t                    personLabel: null,\n196\t                    person_label: null,\n197\t                    person: null,\n198\t                    assignedColor: null,\n199\t                    assigned_color: null,\n200\t                    personColor: null,\n201\t                    person_color: null,\n202\t                    identityResolved: null\n203\t                })]);\n204\t            }).not.toThrow();\n205\t            expect(fillTextArgs()).toContain('?');\n206\t            expect(arcFillStyles).toContain('#6b7280');\n207\t        });\n208\t    });\n209\t\n210\t    // ── identity-RESOLVED blobs ────────────────────────────────────────────────\n211\t\n212\t    describe('identity-resolved blob', function () {\n213\t        it('renders with the person name label (first name)', function () {\n214\t            renderBlobs([makeIdentityResolvedBlob({ person_label: 'Alice Wonderland' })]);\n215\t            // drawPeople uses getFirstName() -> 'Alice'\n216\t            expect(fillTextArgs()).toContain('Alice');\n217\t            expect(fillTextArgs()).not.toContain('?');\n218\t        });\n219\t\n220\t        it('colors the blob with a per-person color (not the grey fallback)', function () {\n221\t            renderBlobs([makeIdentityResolvedBlob({ person_label: 'Alice' })]);\n222\t            // getPersonColor(name) hashes the name into an hsl() color; never '#6b7280'.\n223\t            const hasPersonColor = arcFillStyles.some(function (c) {\n224\t                return /^hsl\\(/.test(String(c));\n225\t            });\n226\t            expect(hasPersonColor).toBe(true);\n227\t            expect(arcFillStyles).not.toContain('#6b7280');\n228\t        });\n229\t\n230\t        it('renders distinct resolved people with distinct labels', 'Bob' })\n234\t            ]);\n235\t            const labels = fillTextArgs();\n236\t            expect(labels).toContain('Alice');\n237\t            expect(labels).toContain('Bob');\n238\t * Spaxel Dashboard - Renderer Backward-Compatibility Tests\n *\n * RUNTIME (jsdom) proof for parent bf-2gmx (\"Verify backward compatibility for\n * blob identity fields\"): the dashboard renderer must render blobs that LACK\n * the identity fields (personName / assignedColor / identityResolved and their\n * snake_case aliases person_name / assigned_color / person_label / person_color)\n * WITHOUT throwing or emitting undefined/NaN, while identity-resolved blobs\n * still render WITH their identity (label + per-person color).\n *\n * Why the ambient Canvas 2D renderer (and not the 3D viz3d renderer):\n * The 3D renderer viz3d.js evaluates `new THREE.Raycaster()` and\n * `new THREE.Vector2()` at module top level and depends on Three.js (WebGL),\n * which is unavailable under jsdom — so it cannot be loaded here. That is\n * exactly why every existing dashboard test suite SKIPS the renderer. The\n * ambient renderer (ambient_renderer.js) is the renderer path that DOES load\n * under jsdom: it is a self-contained IIFE backed by the Canvas 2D context\n * mock in ambient.test.setup.js. Its drawPeople() is the one code path that\n * reads a blob's identity fields (person_label || person) directly during blob\n * rendering and funnels them through the hardened getPersonColor() helper\n * (bf-gcotl added the `if (!personName) return '#6b7280'` guard). Loading it\n * for real and driving a render frame is therefore a genuine runtime proof of\n * the backward-compat contract, not just a type check.\n *\n * Bead: bf-20cl7. Parent: bf-2gmx. Static audit: bf-gcotl.\n */\n\ndescribe('Renderer backward-compat with identity-less blobs', function () {\n\n    let canvas;\n    let renderer;\n    let ctx;\n\n    // Identity fields are all OPTIONAL on the wire. A pre-identity (identity-less)\n    // blob — e.g. one emitted by the local sim WITHOUT --ble — carries NONE of:\n    //   personName / person_name / personLabel / person_label / person\n    //   assignedColor / assigned_color / personColor / person_color\n    //   identityResolved\n    function makeIdentityLessBlob(overrides) {\n        return Object.assign({\n            id: 1,\n            x: 2.5,\n            y: 2.5,\n            z: 1.0,\n            vx: 0,\n            vy: 0,\n            vz: 0,\n            confidence: 0.8\n            // NOTE: no identity fields at all\n        }, overrides || {});\n    }\n\n    function makeIdentityResolvedBlob(overrides) {\n        // Identity-resolved blob carries the full identity field set, including\n        // both the camelCase (viz3d / ble-panel) and snake_case (ambient renderer)\n        // aliases. The renderer must pick up the identity and render with it.\n        return Object.assign(makeIdentityLessBlob({\n            id: 1,\n            person_label: 'Alice',\n            person_name: 'Alice',\n            personName: 'Alice',\n            assignedColor: '#3b82f6',\n            assigned_color: '#3b82f6',\n            personColor: '#3b82f6',\n            person_color: '#3b82f6',\n            identityResolved: true\n        }), overrides || {});\n    }\n\n    // Load the renderer into jsdom (runs the IIFE → window.SpaxelAmbientRenderer).\n    function ensureRendererLoaded() {\n        if (typeof window.SpaxelAmbientRenderer === 'undefined') {\n            require('./ambient_renderer.js');\n        }\n        return window.SpaxelAmbientRenderer;\n    }\n\n    function setupRenderer() {\n        renderer = ensureRendererLoaded();\n\n        canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n        canvas.width = 800;\n        canvas.height = 600;\n        canvas.style.width = '800px';\n        canvas.style.height = '600px';\n        document.body.appendChild(canvas);\n\n        renderer.init(canvas, { scale: 50, margin: 40 });\n        // Determinism: stop the background RAF loop and drive frames manually.\n        renderer.stopRenderLoop();\n\n        ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n\n        // Capture fillStyle at the moment a filled arc is drawn so we can assert\n        // the color used for each blob (the renderer overwrites fillStyle later\n        // for the status dot / time text, so reading it post-frame is unreliable).\n        arcFillStyles = [];\n        const origArc = ctx.arc;\n        ctx.arc = function (x, y, radius, startAngle, endAngle) {\n            arcFillStyles.push(ctx.fillStyle);\n            return origArc.apply(this, arguments);\n        };\n    }\n\n    let arcFillStyles;\n\n    function renderBlobs(blobs) {\n        renderer.updateState({ blobs: blobs });\n        renderer.render();\n    }\n\n    // The label strings passed to ctx.fillText() across the rendered frame.\n    function fillTextArgs() {\n        const calls = (ctx.fillText && ctx.fillText.mock && ctx.fillText.mock.calls) || [];\n        return calls.map(function (c) { return c[0]; });\n    }\n\n    beforeEach(function () {\n        setupRenderer();\n    });\n\n    afterEach(function () {\n        // Flush module singleton state so tests don't leak blob ids into each other.\n        try {\n            if (renderer) {\n                renderer.updateState({ blobs: [], zones: [], portals: [], nodes: [], alerts: [] });\n                renderer.destroy();\n            }\n        } catch (e) { /* swallow teardown errors */ }\n        if (canvas && canvas.parentNode) {\n            canvas.parentNode.removeChild(canvas);\n        }\n        renderer = null;\n        canvas = null;\n        ctx = null;\n        arcFillStyles = [];\n    });\n\n    // ── module loads under jsdom ───────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    describe('renderer loads into jsdom', function () {\n        it('attaches window.SpaxelAmbientRenderer when the module is required', function () {\n            // beforeEach → ensureRendererLoaded() → require('./ambient_renderer.js').\n            // The assertion passes iff that require ran the module's IIFE and\n            // attached the renderer to window WITHOUT throwing — i.e. the renderer\n            // is genuinely loadable under jsdom (the thing viz3d cannot do).\n            expect(window.SpaxelAmbientRenderer).toBeDefined();\n            expect(typeof window.SpaxelAmbientRenderer).toBe('object');\n            expect(typeof window.SpaxelAmbientRenderer.init).toBe('function');\n            expect(typeof window.SpaxelAmbientRenderer.render).toBe('function');\n            expect(typeof window.SpaxelAmbientRenderer.updateState).toBe('function');\n        });\n    });\n\n    // ── identity-LESS blobs (the backward-compat core) ─────────────────────────\n\n    describe('blob with NO identity fields', function () {\n        it('renders a full frame without throwing', function () {\n            expect(function () {\n                renderBlobs([makeIdentityLessBlob()]);\n            }).not.toThrow();\n        });\n\n        it('applies a sane fallback label and never emits \"undefined\"/\"NaN\"', function () {\n            renderBlobs([makeIdentityLessBlob()]);\n\n            const labels = fillTextArgs();\n            expect(labels.length).toBeGreaterThan(0);\n            labels.forEach(function (text) {\n                const s = String(text);\n                expect(s).not.toMatch(/undefined/i);\n                expect(s).not.toMatch(/NaN/);\n            });\n            // Unknown blob falls back to the '?' label, not a name.\n            expect(labels).toContain('?');\n        });\n\n        it('colors the blob with the neutral fallback, not a per-person color', function () {\n            renderBlobs([makeIdentityLessBlob()]);\n            // getPersonColor(undefined) -> '#6b7280' (grey) is the fillStyle in\n            // effect when the blob's arc is stroked. '#22c55e' is the green status\n            // dot drawn afterwards — neither is an identity-derived color.\n            expect(arcFillStyles).toContain('#6b7280');\n            arcFillStyles.forEach(function (c) {\n                // No identity color (hsl hash) should be produced for an identity-less blob.\n                expect(String(c)).not.toMatch(/^hsl\\(/);\n            });\n        });\n\n        it('stays safe when every identity field is explicitly null', function () {\n            expect(function () {\n                renderBlobs([makeIdentityLessBlob({\n                    personName: null,\n                    person_name: null,\n                    personLabel: null,\n                    person_label: null,\n                    person: null,\n                    assignedColor: null,\n                    assigned_color: null,\n                    personColor: null,\n                    person_color: null,\n                    identityResolved: null\n                })]);\n            }).not.toThrow();\n            expect(fillTextArgs()).toContain('?');\n            expect(arcFillStyles).toContain('#6b7280');\n        });\n    });\n\n    // ── identity-RESOLVED blobs ────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    describe('identity-resolved blob', function () {\n        it('renders with the person name label (first name)', function () {\n            renderBlobs([makeIdentityResolvedBlob({ person_label: 'Alice Wonderland' })]);\n            // drawPeople uses getFirstName() -> 'Alice'\n            expect(fillTextArgs()).toContain('Alice');\n            expect(fillTextArgs()).not.toContain('?');\n        });\n\n        it('colors the blob with a per-person color (not the grey fallback)', function () {\n            renderBlobs([makeIdentityResolvedBlob({ person_label: 'Alice' })]);\n            // getPersonColor(name) hashes the name into an hsl() color; never '#6b7280'.\n            const hasPersonColor = arcFillStyles.some(function (c) {\n                return /^hsl\\(/.test(String(c));\n            });\n            expect(hasPersonColor).toBe(true);\n            expect(arcFillStyles).not.toContain('#6b7280');\n        });\n\n        it('renders distinct resolved people with distinct labels', function () {\n            renderBlobs([\n                makeIdentityResolvedBlob({ id: 1, person_label: 'Alice' }),\n                makeIdentityResolvedBlob({ id: 2, person_label: 'Bob' })\n            ]);\n            const labels = fillTextArgs();\n            expect(labels).toContain('Alice');\n            expect(labels).toContain('Bob');\n            labels.forEach(function (text) {\n                expect(String(text)).not.toMatch(/undefined/i);\n                expect(String(text)).not.toMatch(/NaN/);\n            });\n        });\n    });\n\n    // ── the realistic backward-compat scenario: a mixed fleet ──────────────────\n\n    describe('mixed fleet (resolved + identity-less blobs together)', function () {\n        it('renders every blob without throwing and with no undefined/NaN', function () {\n            expect(function () {\n                renderBlobs([\n                    makeIdentityResolvedBlob({ id: 1, person_label: 'Alice' }),\n                    makeIdentityLessBlob({ id: 2 }),                    // no identity\n                    makeIdentityLessBlob({ id: 3, identityResolved: false }) // unresolved\n                ]);\n            }).not.toThrow();\n\n            const labels = fillTextArgs();\n            expect(labels).toContain('Alice');  // resolved\n            expect(labels).toContain('?');      // identity-less fallback\n\n            // Both color paths are exercised: a per-person hsl color AND the grey fallback.\n            expect(arcFillStyles.some(function (c) { return /^hsl\\(/.test(String(c)); })).toBe(true);\n            expect(arcFillStyles).toContain('#6b7280');\n\n            labels.forEach(function (text) {\n                expect(String(text)).not.toMatch(/undefined/i);\n                expect(String(text)).not.toMatch(/NaN/);\n            });\n        });\n    });\n});\n","numLines":272,"startLine":1,"totalLines":272}}}

};\n147\t                    targetPositions.set(blob.id, target);\n148\t\n149\t                    // Initialize current position if this is a new blob\n150\t                    if /**\n213\t         * Manually trigger a render\n214\t         */\n215\t        render() {\n216\t            if (ctx && canvas) {\n217\t                renderFrame();\n218\t            }\n219\t        },\n220\t\n221\t        /**\n222\t         * Enter alert mode\n223\t         * @param {Object} alert - Alert data\n224\t         */\n225\t        enterAlertMode(alert) {\n226\t },\n261\t\n262\t        /**\n263\t         * Clean up resources\n264\t         */\n265\t        destroy() {\n266\t            stopRenderLoop();\n267\t            stopAlertPulse();\n268\t            if const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;\n313\t\n314\t        canvas.width = rect.width * dpr;\n315\t        canvas.height = rect.height * dpr;\n316\t        canvas.style.width = rect.width + 'px';\n317\t        canvas.style.height = rect.height + 'px';\n318\t\n319\t        if (ctx) {\n320\t            ctx.scale(dpr, dpr);\n321\t        }\n322\t    }\n323\t\n324\t    function startRenderLoop() {\n325\t        stopRenderLoop();\n326\t\n327\t        function renderLoop(timestamp) {\n328\t            // Throttle to 2 Hz (500ms between frames)\n329\t            if (timestamp - lastRenderTime >= RENDER_INTERVAL_MS) {\n330\t                lastRenderTime = timestamp;\n331\t                renderFrame();\n332\t            }\n333\t            renderTimer = requestAnimationFrame(renderLoop);\n334\t        }\n335\t\n336\t        renderTimer = requestAnimationFrame(renderLoop);\n337\t    }\n338\t\n339\t    function stopRenderLoop() {\n340\t        if (renderTimer) {\n341\t            cancelAnimationFrame(renderTimer);\n342\t            renderTimer = null;\n343\t        }\n344\t    }\n345\t\n346\t    function renderFrame() {\n347\t        if (!ctx || !canvas) return;\n348\t\n349\t        renderCallCount++; // Track render calls for testing\n350\t\n351\t        const width = canvas.width / (window.devicePixelRatio || 1);\n352\t        const height = canvas.height / (window.devicePixelRatio || 1);\n353\t\n354\t        // Clear canvas\n355\t        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height);\n356\t\n357\t        // Get current time period and colors\n358\t        const period = AmbientRenderer.getTimePeriod();\n359\t        const colors = TIME_COLORS[period];\n360\t\n361\t        // Draw background\n362\t        drawBackground(ctx, width, height, colors);\n363\t\n364\t        // Check for alert mode\n365\t        const hasActiveAlert = currentState.alerts.length > 0;\n366\t        if (hasActiveAlert) {\n367\t            drawAlertMode(ctx, width, height);\n368\t            return; // Alert mode takes over the entire canvas\n369\t        }\n370\t\n371\t        // Calculate floor plan bounds\n372\t        const bounds = calculateBounds(width, height);\n373\t\n374\t        // Draw zones (room outlines)\n375\t        drawZones(ctx, bounds, colors);\n376\t\n377\t        // Draw portals\n378\t        drawPortals(ctx, bounds, colors);\n379\t\n380\t        // Draw nodes\n381\t        drawNodes(ctx, bounds, colors);\n382\t\n383\t        // Draw people (with lerp-interpolated positions)\n384\t        drawPeople(ctx, bounds, colors);\n385\t\n386\t        // Draw system status indicator (top-left)\n387\t        drawSystemStatus(ctx, colors);\n388\t\n389\t        // Draw time display (top-right)\n390\t        drawTimeDisplay(ctx, width, colors);\n391\t    }\n392\t\n393\t    function drawBackground(ctx, width, height, colors) {\n394\t        // Solid background color based on time of day\n395\t        ctx.fillStyle = colors.bg;\n396\t        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);\n397\t    }\n398\t\n399\t    function drawAlertMode(ctx, width, height) {\n400\t        // Pulsing red background for alert mode\n401\t        const pulseIntensity = alertPulseState ? 1.0 : 0.7;\n402\t\n403\t        // Create gradient background\n404\t        const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(\n405\t            width / 2, height / 2, 0,\n406\t            width / 2, height / 2, Math.max(width, height) / 2\n407\t        );\n408\t        gradient.addColorStop(0, `rgba(220, 38, 38, ${pulseIntensity})`);\n409\t        gradient.addColorStop(1, `rgba(127, 29, 29, ${pulseIntensity * 0.8})`);\n410\t\n411\t        ctx.fillStyle = gradient;\n412\t        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);\n413\t\n414\t        // Draw pulsing border\n415\t        const borderWidth = 8 + (pulseIntensity * 4); // 8-12px\n416\t        ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(255, 255, 255, ${pulseIntensity})`;\n417\t        ctx.lineWidth = borderWidth;\n418\t        ctx.strokeRect(0, 0, width, height);\n419\t\n420\t        // Draw alert text\n421\t        const alert = currentState.alerts[0];\n422\t        if (alert) {\n423\t            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';\n424\t            ctx.font = 'bold 48px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif';\n425\t            ctx.textAlign = 'center';\n426\t            ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';\n427\t\n428\t            const title = alert.type === 'fall_alert' ? 'FALL DETECTED' :\n429\t                          alert.type === 'anomaly' ? 'ANOMALY' : 'ALERT';\n430\t            const message = formatAlertMessage(alert);\n431\t\n432\t            ctx.fillText(title, width / 2, height / 2 - 30);\n433\t            ctx.font = '24px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif';\n434\t            ctx.fillText(message, width / 2, height / 2 + 30);\n435\t\n436\t            // Draw acknowledge button\n437\t            const buttonWidth = 200;\n438\t            const buttonHeight = 60;\n439\t            const buttonX = (width - buttonWidth) / 2;\n440\t            const buttonY = height / 2 + 80;\n441\t\n442\t            // Button background with glow\n443\t            ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255, 255, 255, ${0.9 + pulseIntensity * 0.1})`;\n444\t            ctx.shadowColor = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5)';\n445\t            ctx.shadowBlur = 10;\n446\t            ctx.beginPath();\n447\t            ctx.roundRect(buttonX, buttonY, buttonWidth, buttonHeight, 8);\n448\t            ctx.fill();\n449\t            ctx.shadowBlur = 0;\n450\t\n451\t            ctx.fillStyle = '#dc2626';\n452\t            ctx.font = 'bold 20px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif';\n453\t            ctx.fillText('Acknowledge', width / 2, buttonY + buttonHeight / 2);\n454\t        }\n455\t    }\n456\t\n457\t    function formatAlertMessage(alert) {\n458\t        if (alert.type === 'fall_alert') {\n459\t            const person = alert.person || 'Someone';\n460\t            return `${person} has fallen`;\n461\t        } else if (alert.type === 'anomaly') {\n462\t            return 'Unusual activity detected';\n463\t        }\n464\t        return 'Alert detected';\n465\t    }\n466\t\n467\t    function calculateBounds(canvasWidth, canvasHeight) {\n468\t        // Find bounds of all zones\n469\t        if (currentState.zones.length === 0) {\n470\t            // Default bounds - centered square\n471\t            const size = Math.min(canvasWidth, canvasHeight) - config.margin * 2;\n472\t            return {\n473\t                x: (canvasWidth - size) / 2,\n474\t                y: (canvasHeight - size) / 2,\n475\t                width: size,\n476\t                height: size,\n477\t                scale: size / 10, // 10 meters default\n478\t                minX: 0,\n479\t                minY: 0\n480\t            };\n481\t        }\n482\t\n483\t        let minX = Infinity, minY = Infinity;\n484\t        let maxX = -Infinity, maxY = -Infinity;\n485\t\n486\t        currentState.zones.forEach(zone => {\n487\t            const x = zone.x || zone.MinX || 0;\n488\t            const y = zone.y || zone.MinY || 0;\n489\t            const w = zone.w || zone.SizeX || zone.w || 1;\n490\t            const d = zone.d || zone.SizeY || zone.d || 1;\n491\t\n492\t            minX = Math.min(minX, x);\n493\t            minY = Math.min(minY, y);\n494\t            maxX = Math.max(maxX, x + w);\n495\t            maxY = Math.max(maxY, y + d);\n496\t        });\n497\t\n498\t        // Add margin\n499\t        const marginMeters = 1; // 1 meter margin\n500\t        minX -= marginMeters;\n501\t        minY -= marginMeters;\n502\t        maxX += marginMeters;\n503\t        maxY += marginMeters;\n504\t\n505\t        const floorWidth = maxX - minX;\n506\t        const floorHeight = maxY - minY;\n507\t\n508\t        // Calculate scale to fit canvas\n509\t        const scaleX = (canvasWidth - config.margin * 2) / floorWidth;\n510\t        const scaleY = (canvasHeight - config.margin * 2) / floorHeight;\n511\t        const scale = Math.min(scaleX, scaleY, config.scale);\n512\t\n513\t        // Calculate centered bounds\n514\t        const boundsWidth = floorWidth * scale;\n515\t        const boundsHeight = floorHeight * scale;\n516\t        const boundsX = (canvasWidth - boundsWidth) / 2;\n517\t        const boundsY = (canvasHeight - boundsHeight) / 2;\n518\t\n519\t        return {\n520\t            x: boundsX,\n521\t            y: boundsY,\n522\t            width: boundsWidth,\n523\t            height: boundsHeight,\n524\t            scale: scale,\n525\t            minX: minX,\n526\t            minY: minY\n527\t        };\n528\t    }\n529\t\n530\t    function worldToScreen(wx, wy, bounds) {\n531\t        return {\n532\t            x: bounds.x + (wx - bounds.minX) * bounds.scale,\n533\t            y: bounds.y + (wy - bounds.minY) * bounds.scale\n534\t        };\n535\t    }\n536\t\n537\t    function drawZones(ctx, bounds, colors) {\n538\t        currentState.zones.forEach(zone => {\n539\t            const x = zone.x || zone.MinX || 0;\n540\t            const y = zone.y || zone.MinY || 0;\n541\t            const w = zone.w || zone.SizeX || 1;\n542\t            const d = zone.d || zone.SizeY || 1;\n543\t\n544\t            const topLeft = worldToScreen(x, y, bounds);\n545\t            const width = w * bounds.scale;\n546\t            const height = d * bounds.scale;\n547\t\n548\t            // Zone outline (white, 1px stroke)\n549\t            ctx.strokeStyle = '#ffffff';\n550\t            ctx.lineWidth = 1;\n551\t            ctx.strokeRect(topLeft.x, topLeft.y, width, height);\n552\t\n553\t            // Zone label at centroid\n554\t            const centerX = topLeft.x + width / 2;\n555\t            const centerY = topLeft.y + height / 2;\n556\t\n557\t            const count = zone.count || zone.occupancy || 0;\n558\t            const zoneName = zone.name || zone.Name || 'Zone';\n559\t\n560\t            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';\n561\t            ctx.font = '14px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif';\n562\t            ctx.textAlign = 'center';\n563\t            ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';\n564\t            ctx.fillText(zoneName, centerX, centerY);\n565\t\n566\t            if (count > 0) {\n567\t                ctx.font = '12px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif';\n568\t                ctx.fillText(`(${count})`, centerX, centerY + 16);\n569\t            }\n570\t        });\n571\t    }\n572\t\n573\t    function drawPortals(ctx, bounds, colors) {\n574\t        if (!currentState.portals || currentState.portals.length === 0) {\n575\t            return;\n576\t        }\n577\t\n578\t        ctx.strokeStyle = '#a855f7'; // Purple\n579\t        ctx.lineWidth = 0.5;\n580\t\n581\t        currentState.portals.forEach(portal => {\n582\t            // Portal is defined by two points\n583\t            const p1 = worldToScreen(portal.p1_x || 0, portal.p1_y || 0, bounds);\n584\t            const p2 = worldToScreen(portal.p2_x || 0, portal.p2_y || 0, bounds);\n585\t\n586\t            ctx.beginPath();\n587\t            ctx.moveTo(p1.x, p1.y);\n588\t            ctx.lineTo(p2.x, p2.y);\n589\t            ctx.stroke();\n590\t        });\n591\t    }\n592\t\n593\t    function drawNodes(ctx, bounds, colors) {\n594\t        currentState.nodes.forEach(node => {\n595\t            const x = node.pos_x || node.PosX || 0;\n596\t            const y = node.pos_y || node.PosY || 0;\n597\t\n598\t            const pos = worldToScreen(x, y, bounds);\n599\t\n600\t            // Small filled circle (4px radius)\n601\t            ctx.fillStyle = '#6b7280'; // Grey\n602\t            ctx.beginPath();\n603\t            ctx.arc(pos.x, pos.y, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);\n604\t            ctx.fill();\n605\t        });\n606\t    }\n607\t\n608\t    function drawPeople(ctx, bounds, colors) {\n609\t        currentState.blobs.forEach(blob => {\n610\t            // Get current position (with lerp interpolation)\n611\t            let pos = currentPositions.get(blob.id);\n612\t            if (!pos) {\n613\t                pos = { x: blob.x, y: blob.y, z: blob.z || 0 };\n614\t                currentPositions.set(blob.id, pos);\n615\t            }\n616\t\n617\t            // Get target position\n618\t            const target = targetPositions.get(blob.id);\n619\t            if (target) {\n620\t                // Lerp toward target (20% of remaining distance)\n621\t                pos.x = lerp(pos.x, target.x, LERP_FACTOR);\n622\t                pos.y = lerp(pos.y, target.y, LERP_FACTOR);\n623\t                pos.z = lerp(pos.z, target.z, LERP_FACTOR);\n624\t\n625\t                // Update the currentPositions map with the lerped position\n626\t                currentPositions.set(blob.id, { ...pos });\n627\t            }\n628\t\n629\t            const screenPos = worldToScreen(pos.x, pos.y, bounds);\n630\t\n631\t            // Blob radius proportional to identity confidence\n632\t            const confidence = blob.confidence || 0.5;\n633\t            const radius = 10 + (confidence * 8); // 10-18px\n634\t\n635\t            // Get person color\n636\t            let blobColor = '#6b7280'; // Grey for unknown\n637\t            // Handle both person_label (from backend) and person (for consistency)\n638\t            const personName = blob.person_label || blob.person || null;\n639\t            if (personName) {\n640\t                blobColor = getPersonColor(personName);\n641\t            }\n642\t\n643\t            // Draw person blob\n644\t            ctx.fillStyle = blobColor;\n645\t            ctx.beginPath();\n646\t            ctx.arc(screenPos.x, screenPos.y, radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);\n647\t            ctx.fill();\n648\t\n649\t            // Draw name label above\n650\t            const name = personName ? getFirstName(personName) : '?';\n651\t            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';\n652\t            ctx.font = '12px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif';\n653\t            ctx.textAlign = 'center';\n654\t            ctx.fillText(name, screenPos.x, screenPos.y - radius - 4);\n655\t        });\n656\t    }\n657\t\n658\t    function drawSystemStatus(ctx, colors) {\n659\t        const size = 16; // 8px radius = 16px diameter\n660\t        const margin = 16;\n661\t        const x = margin + size / 2;\n662\t        const y = margin + size / 2;\n663\t\n664\t        // Determine status color\n665\t        let statusColor;\n666\t        if (currentState.alerts.length > 0) {\n667\t            statusColor = '#ef4444'; // Red - * 2);\n686\t        ctx.fill();\n687\t    }\n688\t\n689\t    function drawTimeDisplay(ctx, canvasWidth, colors) {\n690\t        const now = new Date();\n691\t        const timeStr = now.toLocaleTimeString('en-US', {\n692\t            hour: 'numeric',\n693\t            minute: '2-digit',\n694\t            hour12: true\n695\t        });\n696\t\n697\t        ctx.fillStyle = colors.text;\n698\t        ctx.font = '28px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, monospace';\n699\t        ctx.textAlign = 'right';\n700\t        ctx.textBaseline = 'top';\n701\t        ctx.fillText(timeStr, canvasWidth - 16, 16);\n702\t    }\n703\t\n704\t    // ============================================\n705\t    // Auto-Dim Logic\n706\t    //   // Reduce canvas brightness to 40%\n721\t        canvas.style.filter = 'brightness(0.4)';\n722\t        canvas.style.transition = 'filter 0.5s ease';\n723\t        console.log('[AmbientRenderer] Entered dim mode');\n724\t    }\n725\t\n726\t    function checkAmbientZonePresence() {\n727\t        if (!config.ambientZone) {\n728\t            return; // No ambient zone configured\n729\t        }\n730\t\n731\t        // Check if anyone is in the ambient zone\n732\t        const zone = currentState.zones.find(z => z.id === config.ambientZone || z.name === config.ambientZone);\n733\t        if (zone && (zone.count > 0 || zone.occupancy > 0)) {\n734\t            // Someone is present - wake from dim\n735\t            if (isDimmed) {\n736\t                AmbientRenderer.wakeFromDim();\n737\t            }\n738\t            // Reset the timer\n739\t            resetDimTimer();\n740\t        }\n741\t    }\n742\t\n743\t    // ============================================\n744\t    // Alert Pulse Animation\n745\t    // ============================================\n746\t\n747\t    function startAlertPulse() {\n748\t        if (alertPulseTimer) {\n749\t            return; // Already running\n750\t        }\n751\t\n752\t        alertPulseTimer = setInterval(() => {\n753\t            alertPulseState = !alertPulseState;\n754\t            // Force immediate render\n755\t            renderFrame();\n756\t        }, ALERT_PULSE_INTERVAL_MS);\n757\t    }\n758\t\n759\t    function stopAlertPulse() {\n760\t        if (alertPulseTimer) {\n761\t ============================================\n768\t    // Helper Functions\n769\t    // ============================================\n770\t\n771\t    function lerp(start, end, factor) {\n772\t        return start + (end - start) * factor;\n773\t    }\n774\t\n775\t    function getPersonColor(personName) {\n776\t        // Identity name fields (personName/person_label) are optional on the wire;\n777\t        // never dereference an undefined name. Today's sole caller guards with\n778\t        // `if (personName)`, but harden the helper so the contract holds for any\n779\t        // future caller (audit bf-gcotl / parent bf-2gmx).\n780\t        if (!personName) return '#6b7280'; // Grey for unknown (matches line ~629)\n781\t        // Generate consistent color from name\n782\t        let hash = 0;\n783\t        for (let i = 0; i < personName.length; i++) {\n784\t            hash = personName.charCodeAt(i) + ((hash << 5) - hash);\n785\t        }\n786\t        const hue = Math.abs(hash) % 360;\n787\t        return `hsl(${hue}, 70%, 50%)`;\n788\t    }\n789\t\n790\t    function getFirstName(fullName) {\n791\t        if (!fullName) return '?';\n792\t        const parts = fullName.trim().split(/\\s+/);\n793\t        return parts[0];\n794\t    }\n795\t\n796\t    function updateSystemHealth() {\n797\t        if (currentState.alerts.length > 0) {\n798\t            currentState.systemHealth = 'alert';\n799\t            return;\n800\t        }\n801\t\n802\t        const onlineNodes = currentState.nodes.filter(n => n.status === 'online').length;\n803\t        const totalNodes = currentState.nodes.length;\n804\t\n805\t        if (totalNodes === 0) {\n806\t            currentState.systemHealth = 'unknown';\n807\t        } else if (onlineNodes === 0) {\n808\t            currentState.systemHealth = 'offline';\n809\t        } else if (onlineNodes < totalNodes) {\n810\t            currentState.systemHealth = 'degraded';\n811\t        } else {\n812\t            currentState.systemHealth = 'healthy';\n813\t        }\n814\t    }\n815\t\n816\t    // ============================================\n817\t    // Canvas Interaction\n818\t    // ============================================\n819\t\n820\t    function setupCanvasInteraction() {\n821\t        if (!canvas) return;\n822\t\n823\t        // Handle clicks on canvas (for alert acknowledgment)\n824\t        canvas.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n825\t            const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n826\t            const x = e.clientX - rect.left;\n827\t            const y = e.clientY - rect.top;\n828\t\n829\t            // Check if click is on acknowledge button in alert mode\n830\t            if (currentState.alerts.length > 0) {\n831\t                const width = canvas.width / (window.devicePixelRatio || 1);\n832\t                const height = canvas.height / (window.devicePixelRatio || 1);\n833\t\n834\t                const buttonWidth = 200;\n835\t                const buttonHeight = 60;\n836\t                const buttonX = (width - buttonWidth) / 2;\n837\t                const buttonY = height / 2 + 80;\n838\t\n839\t                if (x >= buttonX && x <= buttonX + buttonWidth &&\n840\t                    y >=      }\n845\t            }\n846\t\n847\t            // Any click wakes from dim and resets timer\n848\t            wakeFromDim();\n849\t            if (onUserActivity) {\n850\t                onUserActivity();\n851\t            }\n852\t        });\n853\t\n854\t        // Handle touch events\n855\t        canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {\n856\t            wakeFromDim();\n857\t            if (onUserActivity) {\n858\t                onUserActivity();\n859\t            }\n860\t        }, { passive: true });\n861\t    }\n862\t\n863\t    // * Spaxel Dashboard - Ambient Mode Canvas 2D Renderer\n *\n * Dedicated Canvas 2D rendering engine for ambient display mode.\n * Renders at 2 Hz (one frame every 500ms) for minimal CPU usage.\n * Uses lerp-interpolated positions for smooth person movement.\n */\n\n(function() {\n    'use strict';\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Configuration\n    // (matching CSS)\n    const TIME_COLORS = {\n        morning: { bg: '#e0f2fe', text: '#0c4a6e', accent: '#0284c7' },   // 6-10am: bright sky blue\n        day:     { bg: '#ffffff', text: '#1d1d1f', accent: '#3b82f6' },   // 10am-6pm: neutral white\n        evening: { bg: '#1c1507', text: '#fef3e7', accent: '#f59e0b' },  // 6-10pm: warm amber\n        night:   { bg: '#000000', text: '#6b7280', accent: '#9ca3af' }    // 10pm-6am: OLED-safe black\n    };\n\n    // ============================================\n    // State\n    // ============================================\n    let canvas = false; // for pulsing animation\n    let renderCallCount = 0; // Track number of renderFrame calls (for testing)\n\n    // Current state\n    let currentState = {\n        zones: [],\n        blobs: [],\n        portals: [],\n        nodes: [],\n        systemHealth: 'unknown', // 'healthy', 'degraded', 'offline'\n        securityMode: false,\n        alerts: [],\n        lastUpdate: null\n    };\n\n    // Target positions for lerp interpolation (blobId -> {x, y, z})\n    let targetPositions = new Map();\n    // Current interpolated positions (blobId -> {x, y, z})\n    let currentPositions = new Map();\n\n    // Expose internal state for testing\n    function _getCurrentState() {\n        return currentState;\n    }\n\n    function _getCurrentPositions() {\n        return currentPositions;\n    }\n\n    function _getTargetPositions() {\n        return targetPositions;\n    }\n\n    function _getAlertPulseState() {\n        return alertPulseState;\n    }\n\n    function _getRenderCallCount() {\n        return renderCallCount;\n    }\n\n    function _resetRenderCallCount() {\n        renderCallCount = 0;\n    }\n\n    function _enterDimMode() {\n        enterDimMode();\n    }\n\n    function _checkAmbientZonePresence() {\n        checkAmbientZonePresence();\n    }\n\n    // Configuration\n    let config = {\n        ambientZone: null,  // Zone ID for    * Initialize the renderer\n         * @param {HTMLCanvasElement} canvasElement - The canvas element to render to\n         * @param {Object} rendererConfig - Configuration options\n         */\n        init(canvasElement, rendererConfig = {}) {\n            canvas = canvasElement;\n            ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n\n            // Apply configuration\n            Object.assign(config, rendererConfig);\n\n            // Set up canvas\n            resizeCanvas();\n            window.addEventListener('resize', resizeCanvas);\n\n            // Set up canvas interaction\n            setupCanvasInteraction();\n\n            // Start render loop\n            startRenderLoop();\n\n            // Start auto-dim timer\n            resetDimTimer();\n\n            console.log('[AmbientRenderer] Initialized');\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Update the current state\n         * @param {Object} state - New state from WebSocket\n         */\n        updateState(state) {\n            // Update target positions for lerp\n            if (state.blobs) {\n                state.blobs.forEach(blob => {\n                    const target = {\n                        x: blob.x,\n                        y: blob.y,\n                        z: blob.z || 0\n                    };\n                    targetPositions.set(blob.id, target);\n\n                    // Initialize current position if this is a new blob\n                    if (!currentPositions.has(blob.id)) {\n                        currentPositions.set(blob.id, { ...target });\n                    }\n                });\n\n                // Remove blobs that are no longer tracked\n                const trackedIds = new Set(state.blobs.map(b => b.id));\n                for (const id of currentPositions.keys()) {\n                    if (!trackedIds.has(id)) {\n                        currentPositions.delete(id);\n                        targetPositions.delete(id);\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n\n            // Update state\n            // NOTE: currentState.blobs MUST be copied here — drawPeople() iterates\n            // currentState.blobs (not the position maps) to render each person and\n            // read its identity fields. Without this line blobs never reached\n            // drawPeople, so people were never drawn in ambient mode and the\n            // identity-field backward-compat contract (parent bf-2gmx) was\n            // untestable at runtime. Mirrors the zones/portals/nodes/alerts copies.\n            if (state.blobs) currentState.blobs = state.blobs;\n            if (state.zones) currentState.zones = state.zones;\n            if (state.portals) currentState.portals = state.portals;\n            if (state.nodes) currentState.nodes = state.nodes;\n            if (state.alerts) currentState.alerts = state.alerts;\n            if (state.security_mode !== undefined) currentState.securityMode = state.security_mode;\n            currentState.lastUpdate = new Date();\n\n            // Check for alerts to update system health\n            updateSystemHealth();\n\n            // Check for presence in ambient zone (for auto-dim)\n            checkAmbientZonePresence();\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Set the ambient zone for auto-dim detection\n         * @param {string} zoneId - Zone ID to monitor for presence\n         */\n        setAmbientZone(zoneId) {\n            config.ambientZone = zoneId;\n            console.log('[AmbientRenderer] Ambient zone set to:', zoneId);\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Set alert click callback\n         * @param {Function} callback - Function to call when alert is clicked\n         */\n        setAlertClickCallback(callback) {\n            onAlertClick = callback;\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Set user activity callback\n         * @param {Function} callback - Function to call on user activity\n         */\n        setUserActivityCallback(callback) {\n            onUserActivity = callback;\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Manually trigger a render\n         */\n        render() {\n            if (ctx && canvas) {\n                renderFrame();\n            }\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Enter alert mode\n         * @param {Object} alert - Alert data\n         */\n        enterAlertMode(alert) {\n            currentState.alerts = [alert];\n            startAlertPulse();\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Exit alert mode\n         */\n        exitAlertMode() {\n            currentState.alerts = [];\n            stopAlertPulse();\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Wake from dim mode\n         */\n        wakeFromDim() {\n            if (isDimmed) {\n                isDimmed = false;\n                canvas.style.filter = 'brightness(1)';\n                canvas.style.transition = 'filter 0.3s ease';\n                resetDimTimer();\n            }\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Get current time period\n         * @returns {string} - 'morning', 'day', 'evening', or 'night'\n         */\n        getTimePeriod() {\n            const hour = new Date().getHours();\n            if (hour >= 6 && hour < 10) return 'morning';\n            if (hour >= 10 && hour < 18) return 'day';\n            if (hour >= 18 && hour < 22) return 'evening';\n            return 'night';\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Clean up resources\n         */\n        destroy() {\n            stopRenderLoop();\n            stopAlertPulse();\n            if (dimTimer) {\n                clearTimeout(dimTimer);\n                dimTimer = null;\n            }\n            window.removeEventListener('resize', resizeCanvas);\n            console.log('[AmbientRenderer] Destroyed');\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Stop the render loop (for testing)\n         */\n        stopRenderLoop() {\n            stopRenderLoop();\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Start the render loop (for testing)\n         */\n        startRenderLoop() {\n            startRenderLoop();\n        },\n\n        // Testing/internal methods\n        _getCurrentState,\n        _getCurrentPositions,\n        _getTargetPositions,\n        _getAlertPulseState,\n        _getRenderCallCount,\n        _resetRenderCallCount,\n        _enterDimMode,\n        _checkAmbientZonePresence\n    };\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Internal Functions\n    // ============================================\n\n    function resizeCanvas() {\n        if (!canvas) return;\n\n        const container = canvas.parentElement;\n        if (!container) return;\n\n        const rect = container.getBoundingClientRect();\n        const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;\n\n        canvas.width = rect.width * dpr;\n        canvas.height = rect.height * dpr;\n        canvas.style.width = rect.width + 'px';\n        canvas.style.height = rect.height + 'px';\n\n        if (ctx) {\n            ctx.scale(dpr, dpr);\n        }\n    }\n\n    function startRenderLoop() {\n        stopRenderLoop();\n\n        function renderLoop(timestamp) {\n            // Throttle to 2 Hz (500ms between frames)\n            if (timestamp - lastRenderTime >= RENDER_INTERVAL_MS) {\n                lastRenderTime = timestamp;\n                renderFrame();\n            }\n            renderTimer = requestAnimationFrame(renderLoop);\n        }\n\n        renderTimer = requestAnimationFrame(renderLoop);\n    }\n\n    function stopRenderLoop() {\n        if (renderTimer) {\n            cancelAnimationFrame(renderTimer);\n            renderTimer = null;\n        }\n    }\n\n    function renderFrame() {\n        if (!ctx || !canvas) return;\n\n        renderCallCount++; // Track render calls for testing\n\n        const width = canvas.width / (window.devicePixelRatio || 1);\n        const height = canvas.height / (window.devicePixelRatio || 1);\n\n        // Clear canvas\n        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height);\n\n        // Get current time period and colors\n        const period = AmbientRenderer.getTimePeriod();\n        const colors = TIME_COLORS[period];\n\n        // Draw background\n        drawBackground(ctx, width, height, colors);\n\n        // Check for alert mode\n        const hasActiveAlert = currentState.alerts.length > 0;\n        if (hasActiveAlert) {\n            drawAlertMode(ctx, width, height);\n            return; // Alert mode takes over the entire canvas\n        }\n\n        // Calculate floor plan bounds\n        const bounds = calculateBounds(width, height);\n\n        // Draw zones (room outlines)\n        drawZones(ctx, bounds, colors);\n\n        // Draw portals\n        drawPortals(ctx, bounds, colors);\n\n        // Draw nodes\n        drawNodes(ctx, bounds, colors);\n\n        // Draw people (with lerp-interpolated positions)\n        drawPeople(ctx, bounds, colors);\n\n        // Draw system status indicator (top-left)\n        drawSystemStatus(ctx, colors);\n\n        // Draw time display (top-right)\n        drawTimeDisplay(ctx, width, colors);\n    }\n\n    function drawBackground(ctx, width, height, colors) {\n        // Solid background color based on time of day\n        ctx.fillStyle = colors.bg;\n        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);\n    }\n\n    function drawAlertMode(ctx, width, height) {\n        // Pulsing red background for alert mode\n        const pulseIntensity = alertPulseState ? 1.0 : 0.7;\n\n        // Create gradient background\n        const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(\n            width / 2, height / 2, 0,\n            width / 2, height / 2, Math.max(width, height) / 2\n        );\n        gradient.addColorStop(0, `rgba(220, 38, 38, ${pulseIntensity})`);\n        gradient.addColorStop(1, `rgba(127, 29, 29, ${pulseIntensity * 0.8})`);\n\n        ctx.fillStyle = gradient;\n        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);\n\n        // Draw pulsing border\n        const borderWidth = 8 + (pulseIntensity * 4); // 8-12px\n        ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(255, 255, 255, ${pulseIntensity})`;\n        ctx.lineWidth = borderWidth;\n        ctx.strokeRect(0, 0, width, height);\n\n        // Draw alert text\n        const alert = currentState.alerts[0];\n        if (alert) {\n            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';\n            ctx.font = 'bold 48px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif';\n            ctx.textAlign = 'center';\n            ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';\n\n            const title = alert.type === 'fall_alert' ? 'FALL DETECTED' :\n                          alert.type === 'anomaly' ? 'ANOMALY' : 'ALERT';\n            const message = formatAlertMessage(alert);\n\n            ctx.fillText(title, width / 2, height / 2 - 30);\n            ctx.font = '24px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif';\n            ctx.fillText(message, width / 2, height / 2 + 30);\n\n            // Draw acknowledge button\n            const buttonWidth = 200;\n            const buttonHeight = 60;\n            const buttonX = (width - buttonWidth) / 2;\n            const buttonY = height / 2 + 80;\n\n            // Button background with glow\n            ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255, 255, 255, ${0.9 + pulseIntensity * 0.1})`;\n            ctx.shadowColor = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5)';\n            ctx.shadowBlur = 10;\n            ctx.beginPath();\n            ctx.roundRect(buttonX, buttonY, buttonWidth, buttonHeight, 8);\n            ctx.fill();\n            ctx.shadowBlur = 0;\n\n            ctx.fillStyle = '#dc2626';\n            ctx.font = 'bold 20px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif';\n            ctx.fillText('Acknowledge', width / 2, buttonY + buttonHeight / 2);\n        }\n    }\n\n    function formatAlertMessage(alert) {\n        if (alert.type === 'fall_alert') {\n            const person = alert.person || 'Someone';\n            return `${person} has fallen`;\n        } else if (alert.type === 'anomaly') {\n            return 'Unusual activity detected';\n        }\n        return 'Alert detected';\n    }\n\n    function calculateBounds(canvasWidth, canvasHeight) {\n        // Find bounds of all zones\n        if (currentState.zones.length === 0) {\n            // Default bounds - centered square\n            const size = Math.min(canvasWidth, canvasHeight) - config.margin * 2;\n            return {\n                x: (canvasWidth - size) / 2,\n                y: (canvasHeight - size) / 2,\n                width: size,\n                height: size,\n                scale: size / 10, // 10 meters default\n                minX: 0,\n                minY: 0\n            };\n        }\n\n        let minX = Infinity, minY = Infinity;\n        let maxX = -Infinity, maxY = -Infinity;\n\n        currentState.zones.forEach(zone => {\n            const x = zone.x || zone.MinX || 0;\n            const y = zone.y || zone.MinY || 0;\n            const w = zone.w || zone.SizeX || zone.w || 1;\n            const d = zone.d || zone.SizeY || zone.d || 1;\n\n            minX = Math.min(minX, x);\n            minY = Math.min(minY, y);\n            maxX = Math.max(maxX, x + w);\n            maxY = Math.max(maxY, y + d);\n        });\n\n        // Add margin\n        const marginMeters = 1; // 1 meter margin\n        minX -= marginMeters;\n        minY -= marginMeters;\n        maxX += marginMeters;\n        maxY += marginMeters;\n\n        const floorWidth = maxX - minX;\n        const floorHeight = maxY - minY;\n\n        // Calculate scale to fit canvas\n        const scaleX = (canvasWidth - config.margin * 2) / floorWidth;\n        const scaleY = (canvasHeight - config.margin * 2) / floorHeight;\n        const scale = Math.min(scaleX, scaleY, config.scale);\n\n        // Calculate centered bounds\n        const boundsWidth = floorWidth * scale;\n        const boundsHeight = floorHeight * scale;\n        const boundsX = (canvasWidth - boundsWidth) / 2;\n        const boundsY = (canvasHeight - boundsHeight) / 2;\n\n        return {\n            x: boundsX,\n            y: boundsY,\n            width: boundsWidth,\n            height: boundsHeight,\n            scale: scale,\n            minX: minX,\n            minY: minY\n        };\n    }\n\n    function worldToScreen(wx, wy, bounds) {\n        return {\n            x: bounds.x + (wx - bounds.minX) * bounds.scale,\n            y: bounds.y + (wy - bounds.minY) * bounds.scale\n        };\n    }\n\n    function drawZones(ctx, bounds, colors) {\n        currentState.zones.forEach(zone => {\n            const x = zone.x || zone.MinX || 0;\n            const y = zone.y || zone.MinY || 0;\n            const w = zone.w || zone.SizeX || 1;\n            const d = zone.d || zone.SizeY || 1;\n\n            const topLeft = worldToScreen(x, y, bounds);\n            const width = w * bounds.scale;\n            const height = d * bounds.scale;\n\n            // Zone outline (white, 1px stroke)\n            ctx.strokeStyle = '#ffffff';\n            ctx.lineWidth = 1;\n            ctx.strokeRect(topLeft.x, topLeft.y, width, height);\n\n            // Zone label at centroid\n            const centerX = topLeft.x + width / 2;\n            const centerY = topLeft.y + height / 2;\n\n            const count = zone.count || zone.occupancy || 0;\n            const zoneName = zone.name || zone.Name || 'Zone';\n\n            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';\n            ctx.font = '14px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif';\n            ctx.textAlign = 'center';\n            ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';\n            ctx.fillText(zoneName, centerX, centerY);\n\n            if (count > 0) {\n                ctx.font = '12px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif';\n                ctx.fillText(`(${count})`, centerX, centerY + 16);\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    function drawPortals(ctx, bounds, colors) {\n        if (!currentState.portals || currentState.portals.length === 0) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        ctx.strokeStyle = '#a855f7'; // Purple\n        ctx.lineWidth = 0.5;\n\n        currentState.portals.forEach(portal => {\n            // Portal is defined by two points\n            const p1 = worldToScreen(portal.p1_x || 0, portal.p1_y || 0, bounds);\n            const p2 = worldToScreen(portal.p2_x || 0, portal.p2_y || 0, bounds);\n\n            ctx.beginPath();\n            ctx.moveTo(p1.x, p1.y);\n            ctx.lineTo(p2.x, p2.y);\n            ctx.stroke();\n        });\n    }\n\n    function drawNodes(ctx, bounds, colors) {\n        currentState.nodes.forEach(node => {\n            const x = node.pos_x || node.PosX || 0;\n            const y = node.pos_y || node.PosY || 0;\n\n            const pos = worldToScreen(x, y, bounds);\n\n            // Small filled circle (4px radius)\n            ctx.fillStyle = '#6b7280'; // Grey\n            ctx.beginPath();\n            ctx.arc(pos.x, pos.y, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);\n            ctx.fill();\n        });\n    }\n\n    function drawPeople(ctx, bounds, colors) {\n        currentState.blobs.forEach(blob => {\n            // Get current position (with lerp interpolation)\n            let pos = currentPositions.get(blob.id);\n            if (!pos) {\n                pos = { x: blob.x, y: blob.y, z: blob.z || 0 };\n                currentPositions.set(blob.id, pos);\n            }\n\n            // Get target position\n            const target = targetPositions.get(blob.id);\n            if (target) {\n                // Lerp toward target (20% of remaining distance)\n                pos.x = lerp(pos.x, target.x, LERP_FACTOR);\n                pos.y = lerp(pos.y, target.y, LERP_FACTOR);\n                pos.z = lerp(pos.z, target.z, LERP_FACTOR);\n\n                // Update the currentPositions map with the lerped position\n                currentPositions.set(blob.id, { ...pos });\n            }\n\n            const screenPos = worldToScreen(pos.x, pos.y, bounds);\n\n            // Blob radius proportional to identity confidence\n            const confidence = blob.confidence || 0.5;\n            const radius = 10 + (confidence * 8); // 10-18px\n\n            // Get person color\n            let blobColor = '#6b7280'; // Grey for unknown\n            // Handle both person_label (from backend) and person (for consistency)\n            const personName = blob.person_label || blob.person || null;\n            if (personName) {\n                blobColor = getPersonColor(personName);\n            }\n\n            // Draw person blob\n            ctx.fillStyle = blobColor;\n            ctx.beginPath();\n            ctx.arc(screenPos.x, screenPos.y, radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);\n            ctx.fill();\n\n            // Draw name label above\n            const name = personName ? getFirstName(personName) : '?';\n            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';\n            ctx.font = '12px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif';\n            ctx.textAlign = 'center';\n            ctx.fillText(name, screenPos.x, screenPos.y - radius - 4);\n        });\n    }\n\n    function drawSystemStatus(ctx, colors) {\n        const size = 16; // 8px radius = 16px diameter\n        const margin = 16;\n        const x = margin + size / 2;\n        const y = margin + size / 2;\n\n        // Determine status color\n        let statusColor;\n        if (currentState.alerts.length > 0) {\n            statusColor = '#ef4444'; // Red - alert\n        } else {\n            // Check node health\n            const onlineNodes = currentState.nodes.filter(n => n.status === 'online').length;\n            const totalNodes = currentState.nodes.length;\n\n            if (onlineNodes === 0 && totalNodes > 0) {\n                statusColor = '#ef4444'; // Red - all offline\n            } else if (onlineNodes < totalNodes) {\n                statusColor = '#f59e0b'; // Amber - some degraded\n            } else {\n                statusColor = '#22c55e'; // Green - all healthy\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Draw status dot\n        ctx.fillStyle = statusColor;\n        ctx.beginPath();\n        ctx.arc(x, y, 8, 0, Math.PI * 2);\n        ctx.fill();\n    }\n\n    function drawTimeDisplay(ctx, canvasWidth, colors) {\n        const now = new Date();\n        const timeStr = now.toLocaleTimeString('en-US', {\n            hour: 'numeric',\n            minute: '2-digit',\n            hour12: true\n        });\n\n        ctx.fillStyle = colors.text;\n        ctx.font = '28px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, monospace';\n        ctx.textAlign = 'right';\n        ctx.textBaseline = 'top';\n        ctx.fillText(timeStr, canvasWidth - 16, 16);\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Auto-Dim Logic\n    // ============================================\n\n    function resetDimTimer() {\n        if (dimTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(dimTimer);\n        }\n\n        dimTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n            enterDimMode();\n        }, AUTO_DIM_TIMEOUT_MS);\n    }\n\n    function enterDimMode() {\n        isDimmed = true;\n        // Reduce canvas brightness to 40%\n        canvas.style.filter = 'brightness(0.4)';\n        canvas.style.transition = 'filter 0.5s ease';\n        console.log('[AmbientRenderer] Entered dim mode');\n    }\n\n    function checkAmbientZonePresence() {\n        if (!config.ambientZone) {\n            return; // No ambient zone configured\n        }\n\n        // Check if anyone is in the ambient zone\n        const zone = currentState.zones.find(z => z.id === config.ambientZone || z.name === config.ambientZone);\n        if (zone && (zone.count > 0 || zone.occupancy > 0)) {\n            // Someone is present - wake from dim\n            if (isDimmed) {\n                AmbientRenderer.wakeFromDim();\n            }\n            // Reset the timer\n            resetDimTimer();\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Alert Pulse Animation\n    // ============================================\n\n    function startAlertPulse() {\n        if (alertPulseTimer) {\n            return; // Already running\n        }\n\n        alertPulseTimer = setInterval(() => {\n            alertPulseState = !alertPulseState;\n            // Force immediate render\n            renderFrame();\n        }, ALERT_PULSE_INTERVAL_MS);\n    }\n\n    function stopAlertPulse() {\n        if (alertPulseTimer) {\n            clearInterval(alertPulseTimer);\n            alertPulseTimer = null;\n        }\n        alertPulseState = false;\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Helper Functions\n    // ============================================\n\n    function lerp(start, end, factor) {\n        return start + (end - start) * factor;\n    }\n\n    function getPersonColor(personName) {\n        // Identity name fields (personName/person_label) are optional on the wire;\n        // never dereference an undefined name. Today's sole caller guards with\n        // `if (personName)`, but harden the helper so the contract holds for any\n        // future caller (audit bf-gcotl / parent bf-2gmx).\n        if (!personName) return '#6b7280'; // Grey for unknown (matches line ~629)\n        // Generate consistent color from name\n        let hash = 0;\n        for (let i = 0; i < personName.length; i++) {\n            hash = personName.charCodeAt(i) + ((hash << 5) - hash);\n        }\n        const hue = Math.abs(hash) % 360;\n        return `hsl(${hue}, 70%, 50%)`;\n    }\n\n    function getFirstName(fullName) {\n        if (!fullName) return '?';\n        const parts = fullName.trim().split(/\\s+/);\n        return parts[0];\n    }\n\n    function updateSystemHealth() {\n        if (currentState.alerts.length > 0) {\n            currentState.systemHealth = 'alert';\n            return;\n        }\n\n        const onlineNodes = currentState.nodes.filter(n => n.status === 'online').length;\n        const totalNodes = currentState.nodes.length;\n\n        if (totalNodes === 0) {\n            currentState.systemHealth = 'unknown';\n        } else if (onlineNodes === 0) {\n            currentState.systemHealth = 'offline';\n        } else if (onlineNodes < totalNodes) {\n            currentState.systemHealth = 'degraded';\n        } else {\n            currentState.systemHealth = 'healthy';\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Canvas Interaction\n    // ============================================\n\n    function setupCanvasInteraction() {\n        if (!canvas) return;\n\n        // Handle clicks on canvas (for alert acknowledgment)\n        canvas.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n            const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n            const x = e.clientX - rect.left;\n            const y = e.clientY - rect.top;\n\n            // Check if click is on acknowledge button in alert mode\n            if (currentState.alerts.length > 0) {\n                const width = canvas.width / (window.devicePixelRatio || 1);\n                const height = canvas.height / (window.devicePixelRatio || 1);\n\n                const buttonWidth = 200;\n                const buttonHeight = 60;\n                const buttonX = (width - buttonWidth) / 2;\n                const buttonY = height / 2 + 80;\n\n                if (x >= buttonX && x <= buttonX + buttonWidth &&\n                    y >= buttonY && y <= buttonY + buttonHeight) {\n                    if (onAlertClick) {\n                        onAlertClick(currentState.alerts[0]);\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n\n            // Any click wakes from dim and resets timer\n            wakeFromDim();\n            if (onUserActivity) {\n                onUserActivity();\n            }\n        });\n\n        // Handle touch events\n        canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {\n            wakeFromDim();\n            if (onUserActivity) {\n                onUserActivity();\n            }\n        }, { passive: true });\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Export\n    // ============================================\n    window.SpaxelAmbientRenderer = AmbientRenderer;\n\n    console.log('[AmbientRenderer] Module loaded');\n})();\n","numLines":870,"startLine":1,"totalLines":870}}}

parseInt(match[1]), b: parseInt(match[2]) };\n225\t        }\n226\t    }\n227\t\n228\t    if (colorStr.startsWith('hsl')) {\n229\t        // Simplified HSL to RGB - just return a default color\n230\t 128 },\n241\t        'gray': { r: 128, g: 128, b: 128 }\n242\t    };\n243\t\n244\t    const lower = colorStr.toLowerCase();\n245\t    if (namedColors[lower]) {\n246\t        return
